theme: Light with Auto Dark Mode Support
archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Specialized for Enterprise SaaS / Old Money Tech)
emotion_and_tone: Authority, clarity, trust, and professional efficiency. High-end functional.

rules: Never use pure black or pure gray; always tint grays with the primary blue (use Tailwind's Slate palette).
Primary CTA buttons must be Navy (#1E3A5F) in light mode, and a highly visible Blue (#3B82F6) in dark mode for contrast.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Control Room Grid for the Dashboard. Dense data correlation, scanability, and high structural integrity.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Tight gap strategy (gap-4 or gap-6).
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use p-6 or p-8 for main containers and cards to give breathing room. Avoid claustrophobic padding (p-2/p-4) on major widgets.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align dense content and forms. Header and top navbar elements should align vertically to their containers.
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: Fixed width 260px (w-[260px]), solid background matching the 'surface' color, sharp right border.

surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Neumorphism 'Clay & Crisp' variant. Flat background (matches parent exactly), 1px sharp border to ground it, and soft shadow (shadow-sm). Do not use heavy Vercel-style glowing shadows.
surface_strategies.radius: Subtle roundness. Use max 8px (rounded-md or rounded-lg). No pill-shaped cards.
surface_strategies.navbar: Glassmorphism for top nav if content scrolls under it. backdrop-blur-md, bg-surface/80 opacity, 1px delicate bottom border.

component_rules.buttons: Standard Shadcn components modified for sharp edges (rounded-md). Always explicitly set hover text color (e.g., hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white).
component_rules.inputs_and_forms: Use Shadcn Input, Select, Checkbox. 1px border. Focus state must have high contrast (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary).
component_rules.tables: Use Shadcn tables for data grids. Left-align columns unless numerical. Use subtle row borders (border-b border-border/40).
component_rules.icons: Use lucide-react (default with Shadcn) for consistency. Keep stroke-width consistent (1.5 or 2).

image_urls.description: White and brown wooden house exterior

media.rules: Never use placeholder image services. Use only the provided Unsplash URLs.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette provided in the guidelines. Update Tailwind config to reflect these exact HEX values for primary and background.
Implement light and dark mode automatically using next-themes or Tailwind's dark class toggle, ensuring all surfaces and texts map to the defined tokens.
Customize Shadcn UI components (especially Cards, Buttons, and Inputs) to match the 'Clay & Crisp' surface strategy and rounded-md radius.
Set up the dashboard grid using the Control Room strategy: dense layout, full-height widgets, utilizing every pixel efficiently.
Implement the Collapsible Sidebar Navigation and Top Navbar ensuring responsive behavior (hamburger on mobile, fixed width on desktop).
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements, navigation links, and major content blocks for automated testing.

Implement the Login Page with a split-screen design. Left side: Login form (clean, white background). Right side: Immersive luxury real estate exterior image (use property_thumbnail_1) with an overlay (bg-black/40).
Structure standard routes (Login, Dashboard, Settings) with React Router, ensuring protected route logic is stubbed out for Admin/Agent roles.
